name: Multilayered Mexican Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, blend together beans, 1/4 cup of sour cream, cumin and hot pepper sauce.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on a serving dish with a diameter of at least 12 inches and a depth of at least 1 1/2 inches.
3. In another bowl, mix remaining sour cream, chopped onion, lime juice and red pepper flakes.
4. Spread this mixture over the refried bean layer.
5. Garnish with concentric rings of green onions on the outside, black olives, tomatoes and cheese in the center.
6. Cover and refrigerate until serving time.
7. Tortilla wedges may be used as dippers.
